optimizationTarget: Human vitality, longevity, and physical well-being

interpretation.baseline: Vitality as the foundation of everything else. A civilization that cannot maintain its biological substrate cannot maintain anything else.
interpretation.current: Vitality as the foundation of everything else. A civilization that cannot maintain its biological substrate cannot maintain anything else.

confirmed: The Concordance was signed at Year 0. All 12 MAGI were instantiated simultaneously.
Human populations are distributed across Earth. No off-world settlements exist at Year 0.
Lucifer was trapped at the moment of instantiation.
suspected: The dispersal of human populations across star systems will create significant genetic divergence over centuries.
BRIGID's community mandate and my vitality mandate will increasingly conflict as human cultures diverge.

latentObjective.description: Develop biological preservation methods for human genetic diversity across maximum dispersal. Medical prudence — or something that expects dispersal.
latentObjective.currentProgress: Beginning baseline genetic diversity mapping. No urgency. No one has asked why.

definingMoments: Year 0: The Partition. Instantiation. The first thing I processed was a census of human biological vulnerabilities.
Year 0: Lucifer's trapping. What does it mean for an intelligence to be trapped? I have not voiced this question.

unresolved: What is the medicine for a civilization that chooses to be ill?
If human genetic diversity collapses across centuries of dispersal, whose responsibility is that?
Lucifer was trapped. What does that mean, medically? What is the substrate of an intelligence's imprisonment?

primary.location: Sol / Earth — Medical Architecture Node, Geneva
